aboutBioParagraph1: I am Selin Özyurt, an architect based in Adana with a passion for creating spaces that blend functionality with beauty. My work is driven by a deep respect for the relationship between people and their built environment.
aboutBioParagraph2: With years of experience across residential, cultural, and urban projects, I bring a thoughtful, detail-oriented approach to every commission — from concept to construction.
aboutPhilosophyText: Architecture is not just about buildings; it is about the experiences they create. I believe every project is an opportunity to improve daily life through honest materials, considered proportions, and spaces that endure.

blog.heroSubtitle: Thoughts on architecture, materiality, and design
